cards.title: Ridge Racer loading-screen Galaxian
cards.creator: Namco
cards.notice: Ridge Racer loading-screen Galaxian turns loading time into play by giving players a small game before the main game begins.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: Progress, Not Regress · Big ideas: Waiting / Progress · Subjects: Computer Science / Technology / Psychology
cards.imageInstruction: /imagesearch official still, poster, or page for Ridge Racer loading-screen Galaxian. Use still/image only if rights are clear; otherwise use LINK button.
cards.rightsNote: Often safer as LINK button or official page, not embedded still.

cards.title: Galaxian
cards.creator: Namco
cards.movementContext: Classic arcade shooter reused in Ridge Racer loading
cards.notice: Galaxian is the small arcade game Ridge Racer reused to make waiting feel active instead of empty.
cards.wscConnection: Guiding section: Progress, Not Regress · Big ideas: Waiting / Progress · Subjects: Computer Science / Technology / Psychology
cards.imageInstruction: /imagesearch official still, poster, or page for Galaxian. Use still/image only if rights are clear; otherwise use LINK button.

cards.title: Chrome Dinosaur Game
cards.creator: Google Chrome
cards.notice: Probably the most famous example of an auxiliary game during an internet outage.
